entries.title: Catamaran Yacht Tour, Jeju Island (Korea)
entries.description: Experience Jeju's iconic 60-minute sailing cruise from Daepo Port. Korea's only brand-certified catamaran. Free drinks & unforgettable sunset views.

entries.title: Jeju Bucket List: Catamaran Yacht from Daepo Port
entries.description: Discover why Grande Bleu is Jeju's signature yacht experience. Sunset cruises, fishing, and luxury sailing — all in 60 minutes.
